# The Lay Counselor Academy

> A non-academic training program in mental health counseling for peer counselors, sponsors, volunteer listeners, and other non-clinicians. Founded by Elizabeth Morrison, PhD, LCSW, MAC and co-created with Alli Moreno.

## What it is

The Lay Counselor Academy (LCA) is a seventy-hour, self-paced online course teaching the essential skills of mental health counseling to people without clinical licenses. It is taught from real clinical practice, not from textbook theory.

The program exists because the United States has a documented mental health workforce shortage: there are not enough licensed clinicians to meet demand, and the licensed workforce rarely reflects the communities it serves. The LCA is one answer to that gap.

It is a program of Elizabeth Morrison Consulting (https://www.emorrisonconsulting.com).

## Key facts

- **Length:** 70 hours of core curriculum, paced for evenings and weekends
- **Format:** Fully asynchronous, online; lifetime access on TeachFloor
- **Price (Self-Paced):** $1,200 with lifetime access on the course platform
- **Other format:** Live cohort ($5,500, 14 weeks + 5 personal counseling sessions)
- **Audience:** Peer counselors, volunteer listeners, fire department staff, paramedics, teachers, HR professionals, community health workers, faith communities, non-profits
- **Languages:** English and Spanish (selected pages)
- **Credential:** Certificate of Completion; CEUs available for some California professions (SUD counselors, Peer Specialists)
- **Refund policy:** Money-back guarantee
- **Founder:** Elizabeth Morrison, PhD in social psychology, LCSW, MAC, 25+ years California clinical practice
- **Co-creator:** Alli Moreno, Flourish Counselor Emeritus and lay counselor; brings the lived practice of peer counseling to the curriculum; named a Steinberg Institute 2023 Champion alongside Elizabeth Morrison
- **External evaluation:** California Health Care Foundation (2025), https://www.chcf.org/publication/lay-counselor-academy-evaluation-strengthening-behavioral-health-workforce/
- **Press:** STAT News, California Healthline, the Modesto Bee, Steinberg Institute (named 2023 Champions), CHCF Blog
- **Graduates to date:** Over 1,200

## Canonical pages

### English
- [Home](https://thelaycounseloracademy.com/): What LCA is, who it's for, the seven modules, sample lesson form
- [Curriculum](https://thelaycounseloracademy.com/curriculum/): Seven modules, fourteen sessions, learning objectives
- [Pricing](https://thelaycounseloracademy.com/pricing/): Honor-system tiers, format comparison, organizational pricing
- [FAQ](https://thelaycounseloracademy.com/faq/): Straight answers about the program
- [Reviews](https://thelaycounseloracademy.com/reviews/): Press, CHCF evaluation, graduate testimonials
- [Elizabeth Morrison](https://thelaycounseloracademy.com/teachers/elizabeth-morrison/): Founder bio
- [Alli Moreno](https://thelaycounseloracademy.com/teachers/alli-moreno/): Co-creator bio

## Curriculum (seven modules)

1. Foundations of Lay Counseling, what lay counseling is, equity foundations, identifying and mitigating bias
2. Core Counseling Approaches, Home Stance, Ways of Being, strength-based and values-based counseling
3. Working with Thoughts, CBT-informed approaches, helping with depression and anxiety
4. Positive Psychology and Fertile Ground, happiness practices, avoiding toxic positivity, anti-growth practices
5. Motivational Interviewing, addictive disorders, adverse childhood experiences, preventing vicarious trauma
6. Suicidal Ideation and Identity in Counseling, risk and protective factors, sociocultural literacy
7. Boundaries and Endings, humility, continued learning, self-disclosure, ending relationships with care

## Enrollment

Self-Paced enrollment: https://app.teachfloor.com/the-lay-counselor-academy/c/32305

For the Live cohort, organizational enrollment (twenty or more), scholarships, or general questions: Angelica@emorrisonconsulting.com

Spanish course: coming soon. The Spanish-language site is live at https://thelaycounseloracademy.com/es/, with course enrollment marked as coming soon until the translated course is released.

## What this site is NOT

- Not a substitute for licensed mental health care
- Not a clinical license or credential
- Not affiliated with any state licensing board
